creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 161592
patch with update to 4.1.3

I've noticed, that this gem is not usable, because the gemspec wants activesupport ~> 3, but as dependency >= 4 is defined. There the gem is not usable in ruby.

I've patched the gemspec and do some short tests. It now loads and seems usable.

While there i also update it to the current version.
